title: MikroTik RMK-2/10 - 1U rack mount kit
description: Rackmount kit RMK-2/10 allows the installation of two smaller MikroTik devices with a width of 200mm in traditional 19 inch data cabinets. Alternatively, you can permanently remove the longer part from both brackets and install only one such 200mm wide MikroTik device in a classic 10 inch rack CSS610-8G-2S+IN CRS109-8G-1S-2HnD-IN CRS112-8G-4S-IN CRS310-1G-5S-4S+IN CRS112-8P-4S-IN (2) Holder Screws
